items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Great game, with a haunting story, ambia
items.summary: Great game, with a haunting story, ambiance, themes, and a really fun gameplay, where you actually have to properly build a team AND think to win the fights. A proper human translation is also in the works, and the devs communicate a lot on it.
items.author: Noah
